race.description: Spry Civil Constructions Country Day 23rd May Hcp (Bm58)
race.comment: GOLDEN GURU (2) progressed nicely second-up here, scoring with something in hand. Holder sticks and looks well suited rising to 1400m. Can make it back-to-back wins. IMAMANZOR (1) kept fighting to the line in town last start when up in grade, a solid effort following a dominant pillar-to-post win at Oakbank. The wide draw poses a challenge, but holding his form puts him right in the finish. ELLIOTTO (5) bounced back to form with a narrow defeat at Naracoorte and has the tactical speed to give a strong sight. LELIYN (4) continues to race consistently and doesn't need to improve much to feature again, though he tackles 1400m for the first time. HASTA LA CHILLY (3) got too far back last time but finished off well. Now rock-hard fit, he can be competitive.
